'''wamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earnestly|earnestly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earnestly|earnestly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wamate|wamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wamatesher|wamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wamatesherĂ«m|wamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wamatero|wamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wamateshĂ«|wamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wamateshĂ«m|wamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwamatero|gokiwamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwamateshĂ«|gokiwamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwamateshĂ«m|gokiwamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowamankerom|gowamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowamankeshĂ«|gowamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowamankeshĂ«m|gowamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowamankeya|gowamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wamaterom|wamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wamatemu|wamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wamateya|wamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwamaterom|gokiwamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwamatemu|gokiwamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwamateya|gokiwamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wamamate|wamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wamamatesher|wamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wamamatesherĂ«m|wamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wamamatero|wamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wamamateshĂ«|wamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wamamateshĂ«m|wamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwamamatero|gokiwamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwamamateshĂ«|gokiwamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwamamateshĂ«m|gokiwamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowamamankerom|gowamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowamamankeshĂ«|gowamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowamamankeshĂ«m|gowamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowamamankeya|gowamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wamamaterom|wamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wamamatemu|wamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wamamateya|wamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwamamaterom|gokiwamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwamamatemu|gokiwamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwamamateya|gokiwamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠte|wĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠtesher|wĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠtero|wĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠmĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠterom|wĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠtemu|wĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠmĂŠteya|wĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠmĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠmĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafmafte|wafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafmaftesher|wafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafmaftesherĂ«m|wafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafmaftero|wafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafmafteshĂ«|wafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafmafteshĂ«m|wafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafmaftero|gokiwafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafmafteshĂ«|gokiwafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafmafteshĂ«m|gokiwafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafmafnkerom|gowafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafmafnkeshĂ«|gowafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafmafnkeshĂ«m|gowafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafmafnkeya|gowafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafmafterom|wafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafmaftemu|wafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafmafteya|wafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafmafterom|gokiwafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafmaftemu|gokiwafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafmafteya|gokiwafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
